CREATE TABLE messages (id INT PRIMARY KEY, subject VARCHAR(255), body TEXT, author_id INT, created_at TIMESTAMP);
CREATE TABLE users (id INT PRIMARY KEY, username VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE, password VARCHAR(255), email VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO users (id, username, password, email) VALUES (1, 'user1', 'pass1', 'user1@example.com');
INSERT INTO messages (id, subject, body, author_id, created_at) VALUES (1, 'First Message', 'This is the body of the first message.', 1, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
SELECT * FROM messages WHERE author_id = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE username = 'user1');
SELECT m.id, m.subject FROM messages m JOIN users u ON m.author_id = u.id WHERE u.username = 'user1' AND m.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 DAY';

WITH recent_messages AS (SELECT id, subject FROM messages WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 DAY') SELECT * FROM recent_messages WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM messages WHERE subject LIKE '%Message%');
UPDATE users SET password = 'newpass1' WHERE username = 'user1';
DELETE FROM messages WHERE id = (SELECT id FROM messages ORDER BY created_at ASC LIMIT 1);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM messages WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 DAY' AND author_id = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE username = 'user1');
